description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a simplified central crosshair. Two small, dark, circular objects are visible near the center of the frame. A digital artifact or distortion is visible along the edge of the redaction box in the lower right quadrant. This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B14
summary: The FBI submitted a report to AARO in 2025, consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system. The original imagery was altered with redactions. No accompanying mission report was provided. The operator reported they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The monochrome, grainy image displays a central crosshair and two small, dark, circular objects. A digital artifact or distortion is visible along the edge of a redaction box.
official_resolution: The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP.
bust_reasoning: The bust score is high because the document provides only a single, low-quality, grainy visual image with no described behavior or kinematics. The objects are generically described as 'two small, dark, circular objects,' which could easily be attributed to a wide range of mundane phenomena or camera artifacts, aligning with the 'single low-quality grainy image with no kinematics and no corroborating witnesses' anchor.
full_text:
# FBI Photo B14 - Page 1

[Redacted]

[Redacted]                                [Redacted]
[Redacted]                                [Redacted]
[Redacted]                                [Redacted]

12/31/99 18:20:08

[Note: The page consists of a grainy sensor/camera feed with a crosshair centered on two small, dark, circular objects.]
cover_up_reasoning: The document exhibits substantial concealment, as nearly all textual content on the page, apart from the title and timestamp, is redacted. The repeated '[Redacted]' blocks indicate that significant information, including context, details, and potentially witness information, has been withheld.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局于2025年向AARO提交了一份报告，其中包含一张源自美国军事系统的静止图像。原始图像经过编辑处理。未提供随附任务报告。操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。该单色、颗粒状图像显示一个中心十字线和两个小型、黑暗、圆形物体。在编辑框边缘可见数字伪影或失真。
reported_object_description_zh: 两个小型、黑暗、圆形物体
official_resolution_zh: 操作员报告称，他们无法明确识别该UAP。
bust_reasoning_zh: 排除可能性高，因为该文件仅提供一张低质量、颗粒状的视觉图像，未描述行为或运动学特征。这些物体被笼统地描述为“两个小型、黑暗、圆形物体”，这很容易归因于各种常见现象或相机伪影，符合“单一低质量颗粒状图像，无运动学特征，无旁证”的判定标准。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件存在大量隐瞒，因为页面上除标题和时间戳外，几乎所有文本内容均被删节。反复出现的“[已删节]”块表明，包括背景、细节以及可能的目击者信息在内的重要信息已被扣留。
claims: An unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) was observed via a U.S. military system.
The operator was unable to positively identify the UAP.
The date displayed on the image (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.
claims_zh: 通过美国军事系统观测到一个不明异常现象（UAP）。
操作员无法明确识别该UAP。
图像上显示的日期（12/31/99）不正确，原因是系统日期/时间未设置。
bust_explanations: Lens flare or camera artifact: The image is described as a 'grainy sensor/camera feed' with 'two small, dark, circular objects,' which are common characteristics of lens flares, dust on the sensor, or other optical artifacts.

Bird, bat, or insect at close range: Small, dark, circular objects in a grainy feed could easily be an out-of-focus animal close to the camera lens, especially if the sensor is operating in low light or at a distance.
Distant aircraft or drone: Given the grainy quality and lack of detail, the objects could be distant conventional aircraft or drones, appearing as indistinct dark circles against the background.
bust_explanations_zh: 镜头光晕或相机伪影：该图像被描述为“颗粒状传感器/相机画面”，带有“两个小型、黑暗、圆形物体”，这些是镜头光晕、传感器灰尘或其他光学伪影的常见特征。
近距离的鸟类、蝙蝠或昆虫：颗粒状画面中的小型、黑暗、圆形物体很容易是靠近相机镜头、失焦的动物，尤其是在传感器在弱光或远距离操作时。
远距离飞机或无人机：鉴于图像的颗粒状质量和缺乏细节，这些物体可能是远距离的常规飞机或无人机，在背景中呈现为模糊的暗圆形。
cover_up_indicators: Multiple '[Redacted]' blocks obscure most of the page's text content
cover_up_indicators_zh: 多个“[已删节]”块遮盖了页面大部分文本内容
